Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}What are you doing out here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}When Mom died protecting me, no one believed the truth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}To this day, they say she died in an accident that didn't even happen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}That's why I wanted to clear the record...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I thought that's what she would've wanted... Maybe then she'd finally be at peace...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}They said he died in some violent crime, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}No one knows the truth... Just like with Mom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}And now I'm going to be left behind, just like always...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}The dead are never coming back. You have to accept that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}But you still have your life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I'm not here to bring you back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}You can waste away here, if that's what you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}...But, if you still have the will to fight, then come back and stand on your own two feet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I've known it all along... I've just been lying to myself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I needed something to hate... to keep myself going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I couldn't face the thought of being alone...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}But that's exactly what happened...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 64 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}All this time, I've just been running away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I'm not running away anymore... I swear it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Aragaki-san... I'll see this through to the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The resolution in Amada's heart has awakened a new Persona...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Nemesis{f 0 1 27}, has given rise to {f 0 1 35}Kala-Nemi{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}
